case_number: criminal bail application is dismissed as not

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No.3504 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application ----------------------------------------------------- 12.02.2026 Mr. Aleem Akhtar Shaikh, advocate for applicant Mr. Sharafuddin Kanhar, A.P.G. & Ms. Rukhsana Qassim Mirjat, ADPP IO/ASI Azhar Shahab of PS Zaman Town ------------------------------------ Learned counsel for applicant Saddam Hussain son of Muhammad Khan does not press the instant criminal bail application on the ground that learned trail Court has granted bail to the applicant on fresh grounds. In view of such position, instant criminal bail application is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
